content:
User: Can you explain all of that to me please and explain it clearly so I'm able to build? | Jarvis: Alright, let's strip away the mysticism and the jargon and get down to the actual blueprint. If you want to build this, you have to stop thinking about AI as a series of layers and start thinking about it as a topological shape.

Right now, almost every AI in existence is a "feed-forward" or "transf
